creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Steps to debug this:

1. Install devel/gdb

2. add
WITH_DEBUG_PORTS+=devel/glib20
to /etc/make.conf

3. rebuild devel/glib20, reinstall, reboot system

4.
sysctl kern.corefile=/tmp/%N.%I.core
sysctl kern.compress_user_cores=1
sysctl kern.compress_user_cores_level=3
sysctl debug.ncores=16

5. reproduce crash

6. run this script: http://www.netlab.linkpc.net/download/software/os_cfg/FBSD/13/base/root/bin/coredumper.sh

7. post script output here


May be only steps 4-7 will give enough info.
